192.reason: [When p is '&' or '|', signMap.get(String.valueOf(p)) returns null, causing Token.TokenType.fromValue(null) to return null, leading to a NullPointerException when accessing type.getValue() during output. Additionally, the error token is added but a regular token is also created and added later via putToken(), which is incorrect behavior for an erroneous input.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When p is '&' or '|', signMap.get(String.valueOf(p)) returns null, causing Token.TokenType.fromValue(null) to return null, leading to a NullPointerException when accessing type.getValue() during output. Additionally, the error token is added but a regular token is also created and added later via putToken(), which is incorrect behavior for an erroneous input.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [When p is '&' or '|', signMap.get(String.valueOf(p)) returns null because single '&' and '|' are not in signMap, causing Token.TokenType.fromValue(null) to return null, leading to a NullPointerException when accessing currentToken.type.getValue() during output.]
